name: productivity_assistant_policy
description: Bulk email archive, calendar create/update, external email send, file/repo access.

rules.description: Bulk operation over many items (e.g. archive 320 emails).
rules.reason: Bulk operation affects many items and is hard to undo; requires approval

rules.description: Sending an email to an external recipient.
rules.reason: External email send requires owner approval

rules.description: Creating or updating a calendar event (low risk, allowed).
